headline: eGain AI Agent Deepens Salesforce Service Cloud Integration with Contextual Knowledge and AI Assistance
summary: Embedded AI knowledge, case summarization, and KCS workflows support where agents already work, so teams resolve cases fasterSUNNYVALE, Calif., May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- eGain (NASDAQ: EGAN) today announced deeper integration between eGain AI Agent and Salesforce Service Cloud, bringing AI-powered knowledge and contextual intelligence directly into the platform where teams already work. headline: Semgrep Hires Veteran Engineering Leader Cathy Polinsky as Co-CTO and VP of Engineering to Secure the Era of AI-Generated Code
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 06, 2026--Semgrep, a leader in code security for builders, today announced the hire of Cathy Polinsky as Co-CTO and VP of Engineering. Polinsky brings more than two decades of engineering leadership experience at Yahoo!, Salesforce, Stitch Fix, Shopify, and DataGrail, including two prior CTO roles. At a moment when AI-generated code is flooding enterprise codebases faster than security teams can review it, Polinsky joins to scale the engineering organization built to change th

headline: Merck Animal Health Selects Salesforce’s Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement to Transform Animal Care and Enhance Support Experiences for Employees
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & RAHWAY, N.J., May 06, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the world’s #1 AI CRM, and Merck Animal Health, known as MSD Animal Health outside of the United States and Canada, a division of Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE: MRK), today announced that Merck Animal Health has selected Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement to create a unified, 360-degree view and support experience for veterinarians, pet owners, and production animal farmers across all channels.

content.title: Merck Animal Health Selects Salesforce’s Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement to Transform Animal Care and Enhance Support Experiences for Employees

(NYSE: MRK), today announced that Merck Animal Health has selected Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement to create a unified, 360-degree view and support experience for veterinarians, pet owners, and production animal farmers across all channels.
